name: Tide Warden
desc: Reflect 1 damage when defending against an attack.

name: Mist Phantom
desc: Can attack the turn it is summoned.

name: Runic Guardian
desc: +1 DEF at end of each turn it survives.

name: Frost Seer
desc: Draw 1 extra card when summoned.

name: Wave Breaker
desc: Deals 1 damage to adjacent enemy on attack.

name: Crystal Monk
desc: Allies cannot be debuffed while this is on field.

name: Tide Oracle
desc: +1 ATK for each pure soul you have (max +3).

name: Ether Drake
desc: Cannot be counter-attacked by defence mode cards.

name: Grave Wraith
desc: On kill: gain 1 soul of the killed card's type.

name: Bone Revenant
desc: Returns to your hand once when destroyed.

name: Soul Leech
desc: +1 direct damage when attacking the player.

name: Plague Bearer
desc: Enemy hit by this loses 1 ATK permanently.

name: Lich Overseer
desc: When summoned, draw 1 card from the void.

name: Necrotic Swarm
desc: On kill, summon another Swarm in its place.

name: Shroud Walker
desc: Cannot be targeted by Eternal or bypass abilities.

name: Voidcaller
desc: On summon, add a random tainted card to your hand.

name: Seraph Blade
desc: +1 bonus damage against Infernal cards.

name: Oracle Light
desc: One ally gains +1 DEF at the start of each turn.

name: Arbiter
desc: Can bypass all monsters and attack player directly.

name: Radiant Monk
desc: When summoned, remove all seals from allies.

name: Sun Paladin
desc: On death, restore 3 DEF to one ally.

name: Gilded Cherub
desc: Adjacent allies take 1 less damage.

name: Holy Arbiter
desc: +2 ATK vs Tainted cards.

name: Hellhound
desc: Can attack the turn it is summoned.

name: Ashborn
desc: Enemies must attack this card before any other.

name: Inferno Drake
desc: +1 damage on all attacks dealt.

name: Ember Fiend
desc: At end of your turn, deal 1 damage to a random enemy.

name: Char Titan
desc: All enemies take 1 damage when summoned.

name: Cinder Imp
desc: On death, deal 2 damage to a random enemy.

name: Magma Sentinel
desc: Reduces enemy DEF by 1 on each successful hit.

name: Iron Colossus
desc: Excess kill damage carries through to the player.

name: Pack Leader
desc: +1 ATK to all allied Beast cards on the field.

name: Spore Shambler
desc: Restores 1 DEF at the start of your turn.

name: Rampaging Boar
desc: Deals double damage on first attack after summoning.

name: Elder Tortoise
desc: Allies in adjacent slots gain +1 DEF.

name: Razorclaw
desc: Deals +1 damage for each beast ally on field.

name: Swamp Horror
desc: Attacked enemy cannot switch modes next turn.

name: Hex Binder
desc: Prevents one enemy card from acting for 1 turn.

name: Void Stalker
desc: Cannot be targeted by magic or abilities.

name: Dusk Weaver
desc: -1 ATK to all enemies while this is on the field.

name: Shadow Twin
desc: Copies one ability from an adjacent ally on enter.

name: Abyssal Reveler
desc: Randomly buffs or debuffs one card by 1 at end of turn.

name: Plague Sprite
desc: Reduces a summoned enemy's ATK by 1 on entry.

name: Nightmare Hound
desc: Enemy cards in defence mode take +1 damage.

name: Wandering Soul
desc: On entering field, add 1 random soul to your jar.

name: Iron Golem
desc: Takes 1 less damage from each attack (min 1).

name: Stone Sentinel
desc: +1 DEF each turn it survives on the field.

name: Runic Scribe
desc: When summoned, draw 1 card from your deck.

name: Hired Blade
desc: Can attack the turn it is summoned.

name: Tavern Brawler
desc: +1 ATK when attacking a card with higher DEF.

name: Mirror Mage
desc: Reflects 1 damage back on each attack.

name: Road Veteran
desc: Cannot be affected by Seal or Curse abilities.

name: Plague Rat
desc: When destroyed, summon another 1/1 Plague Rat.

name: Ancient Remnant
desc: Can bypass all monsters and attack player directly.

name: Soul Ferrier
desc: On kill, gain 1 soul matching the killed card type.

name: Bone Archer
desc: Deals 1 damage to a random enemy on enter.
